content:
Nathanael Arkor said:

It would be nice if Zulip distinguished moderators from other users in the panel to the right, so it was easy to know whom to contact.

Something else that will be naturally solved by having a front web page
Aided, certainly. It would be better if the Zulip interface distinguished between normal users and administrators.

Gershom said:

I agree, but I'd also point out that doing things publicly (but with a massively light touch) also encourages others.

I've only told people to chill out in situations where both people involved in the altercation liked me and respected me (I think), and I was telling both of them to chill out - in a friendly sort of way I hope. It worked. But yes, this method will break down when the number of people involved gets larger, and some people show up who are more irascible.
